name: Media viewer
description: Cycles through images and videos from a LAN directory index. Expects index_url to return a JSON array of asset URLs or {url, caption?} objects.

index_url.description: URL returning a JSON array of media URLs or objects

interval_sec.description: Seconds between slides (images; minimum dwell for videos)

caption_position.description: Where to show the filename or caption

show_progress_dots.description: Show slide position dots when multiple items
